description_long: This is a single-story stone house with a flat roof and a prominent arched double-door entryway at the front. The facade features large rectangular windows with wooden frames, and the exterior walls are constructed from light-colored stone blocks. The house is set on a green lawn with flower beds and potted plants at each corner, adding a touch of landscaping. In the backyard, there is a wooden hot tub, a large patio umbrella, and a modern outdoor seating area with a fire pit. The roof is flat and partially open, with a visible staircase leading to the upper level, suggesting a possible rooftop terrace. The overall design blends rustic stonework with modern outdoor amenities, making it suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story stone house with a flat roof, arched entryway, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a hot tub and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched double-door entry, symmetrical windows, and flower beds along the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white stone accent wall, visible staircase, and backyard amenities including a hot tub and patio furniture.
description_view_2: Backyard view with a clear look at the outdoor seating area, fire pit, large umbrella, and the rear of the house.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the flat stone wall, window, and the arrangement of backyard features like the hot tub and umbrella.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched double wooden doors with stone surround, no steps, and flanked by flower beds.
